reason: Tests are tautological (check string presence, not behavior) and solution_uniqueness_guard fails because alternative correct implementations with different naming/patterns would fail. The instruction cannot pass behavior_in_task_description without violating no_solution_leakage — the tests check exact implementation strings like 'RequireFrom(Box<ConstantString>)', 'rel.as_str()', 'parent().join(rel)', 'JsValueUrlKind::Relative' which are the solution itself.
